reviews.text: I can’t say enough about our experience with Alexi. When my now husband and I decided we wanted to elope, my only request was a beautiful Mountain view for our pictures. We were on a time crunch because I am a school teacher and didn’t want to ask for days off once school started. My husband began the search and stumbled upon Alexi hubbell photography and her elopement packages. From the very first email she made everything so easy for us. She set me up with hair and make up and gave me contact info for a florist. She sent me multiple options for locations and helped me choose the perfect one for what I had in mind. The day was an absolute dream and her personality was so fun! She was up for whatever to get the perfect picture and so were we, so it was a perfect pair! She is very creative and our pictures are an absolute work of art. To this day people ask me who took my wedding photos and they look absolutely stunning in our home. I have the fondest memories of our day on the mountain with Alexi. I highly recommend that you book, you will be in good hands.

Alexi is not only a great photographer but a wonderful human and a pleasure to work with.

I used her for brand portraits with the goal to have diverse and unique portraits and brand photos to pick from for social & business media options. She did not disappoint and many months later still use and appreciate the options she helped me create.

Alexi collaborated with me to set up multiple photo backdrops and helped with different props and was careful to keep in mind my main objective as well as my brand colors.

She is a pleasure to work with, you won't be disappointed!

I was getting highly discouraged while shopping for a local wedding photographer. Prices seemed way too high for the quality of the photos that others were asking. I knew Alexi was a talented photographer and reached out for advise on a great wedding photographer, I was beyond thrilled when she said she was a wedding photographer. We set up a consultation and started to look at previous weddings she had photographed and fell in love. We knew she was the photographer for us. Her rates are generously fair, her photos are incredible. She has excellent communication up to and on the big day. Alexi and her team are highly organized and I had zero stress or worry about photos on our wedding day. Once we received our wedding album my eyes swelled with happy tears. They are all so beautiful and captured so many incredible moments throughout our day. She is nothing shy of exceptional and her photos are extraordinary, stunning, magnificent, sensational, and breathtaking. I would recommend Alexi Hubbel if you want the best for your special day. I will be forever grateful for her and her hard work. Thank you Alexi!

Alexi is the most talented photographer I’ve ever seen! She was the photographer for our wedding and was seriously blown away with every single photo. I’m so happy we chose her for our special day. Very professional and got us the pictures pretty fast. Can’t recommend her enough! Thanks Alexi!

Alexi was AMAZING! Like I can’t even rave enough about all the ways she was so perfect, but I’ll try and hit the most important ones..

1. Communication was top notch. I’m from Florida, and planning a destination wedding in Colorado wasn’t the easiest. But Alexi was on top of everything. When we first inquired, we set up a phone call where she explained EVERYTHING to me. After booking, we had great communication through email, phone, text etc. she answered every question I had, and gave great recommendations etc. she then coordinated / communicated with my wedding planner closer to the wedding date, so I didn’t even have to worry about a thing. They sorted everything out together.

2. Organization was unreal. She sent me proposed timelines before I’d even thought about it, and had everything figured out to the minute. She asked for all the family shots I wanted, so that on the day of the wedding, we didn’t have to spend forever getting them done. She ran through them on a piece of paper seamlessly, no one was forgotten and it was so painlesss. I even asked for a group photo, and she made it happen and it was perfect.

3. Attention to detail. So I didn’t realize how important this was (because I’m not a photographer).  But she noticed everything. From my fiancé weirdly having his feet in a photo to my hair out of whack. Every member of our family was amazed how she noticed things when no one else didn’t.

4. The photos themselves … I have no words because I cry every time I look at them. She perfectly captured us. Our style, our personalities, our emotions, she captured us. And I will forever treasure those memories through the pictures.

5. And probably the most important … personality. A photographer is with you from the moment you’re getting ready, to when you’re drunkenly dancing .. and you’ve got to like them. And Alexi was the PERFECT addition to our day. She was upbeat, funny, a good time and obviously very organized. It was a privilege to have her there on our special day.

Ultimately our day was absolutely flawless, and that had a LOT to do with Alexi. 100% recommend.
